generatedSentence: In a cozy, somewhat eccentric apartment filled with the aroma of roasting orange pumpkin and freshly steamed broccoli, Elara meticulously updated her journal, a vibrant hairstyle framing her thoughtful face. She often pondered the nuances of ideological elements, a duchess of her own intellectual realm, having built a reputation for her vivacious spirit. Her telephone sat silently next to a half-eaten fondue, a habitue of the offsite tropical hammocks, her shallow pond of kinship a playful cliché. One evening, a mysterious vortex appeared, twisting the air above her kneepad-clad leg, promising adventure. Obviously, something was wrong. A giant bat, previously unrecognizable, jingled a warning, its features distorted as it swiftly galloped away, hinting at a raid. She felt hesitant, but a powerful urge, greatly powered by a manlike warrior's spirit, propelled her. A munchkin-sized figure, limber and agile, appeared from the vortex, clutching a strange uni-device that looked like a bootleg submarine. He was a weakling compared to the manmade threats she'd faced. He gasped, Swiftly, she upshifted into action, a blur of karate kicks, not hesitating. She had to decode the spyware's effects, which had tripped up the unsuspecting Earthlings, causing a terrible roadblock. The remaining ampules of a strange jelly-like substance glowed, a final, desperate element. This was her appointment, one she could not cancel. With powerful, bold ink outlines, the vivacious warrior faced the bottom, where the true battle was waged. She was no pushover, no groans of a grouchy habitue, but a true warrior who would not be flummoxed by this challenge.

She often pondered the nuances of ideological elements, a duchess of her own intellectual realm, having built a reputation for her vivacious spirit. One evening, a mysterious vortex appeared, twisting the air above her kneepad-clad leg, promising adventure. Obviously, something was wrong. A giant bat, previously unrecognizable, jingled a warning, its features distorted as it swiftly galloped away, hinting at a raid. She felt hesitant, but a powerful urge, greatly powered by a manlike warrior's spirit, propelled her. A munchkin-sized figure, limber and agile, appeared from the vortex, clutching a strange uni-device that looked like a bootleg submarine. He was a weakling compared to the manmade threats she'd faced.

Swiftly, she upshifted into action, a blur of karate kicks, not hesitating. She had to decode the spyware's effects, which had tripped up the unsuspecting Earthlings, causing a terrible roadblock. The remaining ampules of a strange jelly-like substance glowed, a final, desperate element. This was her appointment, one she could not cancel. With powerful, bold ink outlines, the vivacious warrior faced the bottom, where the true battle was waged. She was no pushover, no groans of a grouchy habitue, but a true warrior who would not be flummoxed by this challenge.
imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, vibrant neon futurism, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting, thick white gutters, clean black borders. Protagonist: A vivacious warrior wearing a lime-green kneepad and a silver chrome helmet. TOP-LEFT PANEL: Elara sits at a desk, a glowing journal open, a small orange pumpkin and broccoli nearby, looking out a window at a subtle, shimmering vortex in the distance, medium shot. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: Elara, now standing in a defensive karate stance, confronts a manlike figure emerging from a vibrant neon vortex, a small bat-like creature flying above them, eye-level shot. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: A powerful warrior in futuristic armor, holding a glowing ampule, stands on a rocky mainland runway, surrounded by charging figures resembling vikings, low-angle shot. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: Elara, delivering a powerful karate kick, shatters a transparent, glowing roadblock while battling a powerful, groaning enemy, dynamic action shot.

definitions.definition: An evergreen tree of the genus Citrus such as Citrus sinensis.

To color orange.
To become orange.
Having the colour of the fruit of an orange tree; yellowred; reddish-yellow.
A diary or daily record of a person, organization, vessel etc.; daybook.
A newspaper or magazine dealing with a particular subject.

definitions.definition: A chronological record of payments.
A chronological record of changes made to a database or other system; along with a backup or image copy that allows recovery after a failure or reinstatement to a previous time; a log.
The part of a shaft or axle that rests on bearings.
To archive or record something.
To scrapbook.
To insert (a shaft, etc.) in a journal bearing.
Daily.

The game of Chinese whispers.

To convey (a message) by telephoning.
The style in which someone's hair has been cut and arranged.
A domesticated plant, in species Cucurbita pepo, similar in growth pattern, foliage, flower, and fruit to the squash or melon.

A term of endearment for someone small and cute.

definitions.definition: Used as a filler word, or to introduce information even when not obvious.

definitions.definition: A plant, Brassica oleracea var. italica, of the cabbage family, Brassicaceae; especially, the tree-shaped flower and stalk that are eaten as a vegetable.
A whirlwind, whirlpool, or similarly moving matter in the form of a spiral or column.
Anything that involves constant violent or chaotic activity around some centre.

definitions.definition: Anything that inevitably draws surrounding things into its current.

A supposed collection of particles of very subtle matter, endowed with a rapid rotary motion around an axis which was also the axis of a sun or planet; part of a Cartesian theory accounting for the formation of the universe, and the movements of the bodies composing it.

The encountering of risks; a bold undertaking, in which dangers are likely to be encountered, and the issue is staked upon unforeseen events; a daring feat.

That which happens by chance; hazard; hap.

definitions.definition: A place or a situation where people have limited space to move.

definitions.definition: To suppress; to force into submission.

definitions.definition: The sky.

definitions.definition: To force a company out of business.

definitions.definition: A small hermetically sealed vial, often used to contain a sterile solution suitable for injection.

definitions.definition: To be guilty of a misstep or mistake; to commit an offence against morality, propriety, etc

A topic nearly unrelated to the main topic, but having a point in common with it.

Touching a curve at a single point but not crossing it at that point.
Of a topic, only loosely related to a main topic.
A nocturnal omnivore native to North America, typically with a mixture of gray, brown, and black fur, a mask-like marking around the eyes and a striped tail; Procyon lotor.
Any mammal of the genus Procyon.
Any mammal of the subfamily Procyoninae, a procyonine.
Any mammal of the family Procyonidae, a procyonid.
Relation or connection by blood, marriage or adoption
Relation or connection by nature or character
Organized, large-scale, armed conflict between countries or between national, ethnic, or other sizeable groups, usually involving the engagement of military forces.

definitions.definition: A particular conflict of this kind.
(by extension) Any conflict, or anything resembling a conflict.

definitions.definition: Instruments of war.
Armed forces.
A particular card game for two players, notable for having its outcome predetermined by how the cards are dealt.
To engage in conflict (may be followed by "with" to specify the foe).
To carry on, as a contest; to wage.
Something, most often a phrase or expression, that is overused or used outside its original context, so that its original impact and meaning are lost. A trite saying; a platitude.

definitions.definition: A stereotype (printing plate).
To use a cliché; to make up a word or a name that sounds like a cliché.
Clichéd; having the characteristics of a cliché

definitions.definition: To make (something) known.
To make note of (something).
A unary operation on logical values that changes true to false, and false to true.
Negates the meaning of the modified verb.

definitions.definition: To no degree.

definitions.definition: (understatement, litotes) Used to modify superlatives to indicate the opposite or near opposite, often in a form of understatement.

definitions.definition: And not.

definitions.definition: (1990s) Used to indicate that the previous phrase was meant sarcastically or ironically.

definitions.definition: To cause someone to become annoyed or angry.

To appeal.

The continent; the principal land, as distinguished from islands or a peninsula.
The principal island of a group.
A foreigner or alien.
A stranger or outsider.

A shift to a higher level, such as of frequency, growth, economic level, etc.

definitions.definition: To shift to a higher level, such as of frequency, growth rate, economic level, etc.

definitions.definition: Character, reliability, staying power, dignity, integrity or sound judgment.

definitions.definition: The buttocks or anus.

The second half of an inning, the home team's turn at bat.

A bottom quark.

An abyss.
Power of endurance.

definitions.definition: To wind (like a ball of thread etc.).
To establish or found (something) on or upon.
(chiefly in passive) To lie on the bottom of; to underlie, to lie beneath.
To be based or grounded.
To reach or strike against the bottom of something, so as to impede free action.
To reach the bottom of something.
To fall to the lowest point.
To be the more passive or receiving partner in a sexual act or relationship; to be submissive in a BDSM relationship; to be anally penetrated in gay sex.

definitions.definition: The lowest or last place or position.

(by extension) A stock character common in the fantasy genre, namely a barbarian, generally equipped with an axe or sword and a helmet adorned with horns.

A player on the Minnesota Vikings NFL team.
Vomit
A European bird (Coloeus monedula) of the crow family, often nesting in church towers and ruins.
A Daurian jackdaw, a closely related Asian bird (Coloeus dauuricus).
A lover of something.
A person attached to a particular pursuit, study, or science as to music or painting; especially one who cultivates any study or art, from taste or attachment, without pursuing it professionally.

definitions.definition: Someone who is unqualified or insufficiently skillful.

definitions.definition: Non-professional.
Created, done, or populated by amateurs or non-professionals.

definitions.definition: Showing a lack of professionalism, experience or talent.

definitions.definition: A defined, narrow section of land or an artificial structure used for access.
The usual path taken by deer or other wild animals, such as from a forest to a water source.
A narrow walkway (often on a platform) extending from a stage on which people walk, especially one used by models during fashion shows.
In javelin, long jump, and similar events: a short track along which athletes can accelerate themselves for their jumps or throws.
A section of land, usually paved, for airplanes to land on or take off from.
Hence, the number of months that a startup company can operate on its cash reserves.
A stream bed.

To stay behind while others withdraw; to be left after others have been removed or destroyed; to be left after a number or quantity has been subtracted or cut off; to be left as not included or comprised.
To continue unchanged in place, form, or condition, or undiminished in quantity; to abide; to stay; to endure; to last.

definitions.definition: To await; to be left to.
To continue in a state of being.

definitions.definition: An act or occurrence by which someone or something remains
Remnant.
Which remains, especially after something else has been removed.

definitions.definition: To make (someone) aware of (something impending); especially:
To caution or admonish (someone) against unwise or unacceptable behaviour.

definitions.definition: To give warning.
The action of the verb warn; an instance of warning someone.
Something spoken or written that is intended to warn.

definitions.definition: Used to warn of danger in signs and notices.
(originally student slang) Irritable; easily upset; angry; tending to complain.

definitions.definition: A devotee.

(obsolete outside dialectal) A piece of land thickly wooded, and usually covered with bushes and vines.
To lie in a hammock.
(of a cloth) To hang in a way that resembles a hammock.

definitions.definition: Fun, recreational, not serious.

definitions.definition: Experimental.

definitions.definition: Having, or capable of exerting power, potency or influence.
Large; capacious; said of veins of ore.
To a great extent or degree.

definitions.definition: Conforming to fact, reality or rule; true.

Any of many flat biscuits, or cakes, made from oatmeal.
A covering for a window to keep out light. The covering may be made of cloth or of narrow slats that can block light or allow it to pass.
A destination sign mounted on a public transport vehicle displaying the route destination, number, name and/or via points, etc.
Any device intended to conceal or hide.

A blindage.
A halting place.
The blindside.

definitions.definition: A player who is forced to pay such a bet.

To cover with a thin coating of sand and fine gravel, for example a road newly paved, in order that the joints between the stones may be filled.
(of a person or animal) Unable to see, due to physiological or neurological factors.
(of an eye) Unable to be used to see, due to physiological or neurological factors.
Failing to see, acknowledge, perceive.

definitions.definition: Of a place, having little or no visibility.

definitions.definition: Closed at one end; having a dead end

definitions.definition: Having no openings for light or passage.

definitions.definition: (in certain phrases) Smallest or slightest.

definitions.definition: Without any prior knowledge.

definitions.definition: Abortive; failing to produce flowers or fruit.

definitions.definition: Without seeing; unseeingly.
Absolutely, totally.

A negative reaction, objection or outcry, especially of a violent or abrupt nature.

A contest, a struggle.

definitions.definition: To fight or struggle; to enter into a battle with.

Something similar in shape to the human finger, particularly:
Something similarly extending, from a larger body, particularly:

definitions.definition: Something similar in function or agency to the human finger, with regard to touching, grasping, or pointing.
Various units of measure based or notionally based on the adult human finger, particularly
A part of a glove intended to cover a finger.
Skill in the use of the fingers, as in playing upon a musical instrument.
Someone skilled in the use of their fingers, a pickpocket.
A person.
(especially in the phrase 'give someone the finger') An obscene or insulting gesture made by raising one's middle finger towards someone with the palm of one's hand facing inwards.
To identify or point out. Also put the finger on. To report to or identify for the authorities, rat on, rat out, squeal on, tattle on, turn in.
To poke, probe, feel, or fondle with a finger or fingers.

To query (a user's status) using the Finger protocol.
To steal; to purloin.
To execute, as any delicate work.
The act of appointing a person to hold an office or to have a position of trust

definitions.definition: Decree; direction; established order or constitution.

To cause the fiscal ruin of.

definitions.definition: To destroy or make something no longer usable.

definitions.definition: To upset or overturn the plans or progress of, or to have a disastrous effect on something.

definitions.definition: To make something less enjoyable or likeable.

definitions.definition: To reveal the ending of (a story); to spoil.
To fall into a state of decay.

definitions.definition: Incapacitated by drugs or alcohol
Something that blocks or obstructs a road.
An obstacle or impediment.
To prevent, hinder.

The clerk who tallies cost of purchases and accepts payment.

A cancellation (US); (nonstandard in some kinds of English).

The suppression on striking out of matter in type, or of a printed page or pages.
The page thus suppressed.
The page that replaces it.
To cross out something with lines etc.

To stop production of a programme.
To suppress or omit; to strike out, as matter in type.

A naval officer whose rank is above that of a lieutenant commander and below that of captain.
One who exercises control and direction over a group of persons.
A designation or rank in certain non-military organizations such as NASA and various police forces.
The chief officer of a commandry.
A heavy beetle or wooden mallet, used in paving, in sail lofts, etc.
A rank within an honorary order: e.g. Commander of the Legion of Honour.
Any of various nymphalid butterflies of the Asian genus Moduza.
A scatterbrained or stupid person.

definitions.definition: A chemical hair treatment imparting or removing curliness, whose effects typically last for a period of weeks; a perm.
Given an n \times n matrix a_{ij} \,, the sum over all permutations \pi \, of \prod_{i=1}^n{a_{i\pi(i)}}.
(trading card games) A card whose effects persist beyond the turn on which it is played.
To perm (the hair).
Without end, eternal.

definitions.definition: Lasting for an indefinitely long time.
